Features: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1. This Kids bike comes with stable training wheel early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4.Foot brake suitable for young rider don't have enough power to manipulate the hand brake. | MINIMUM MAINTENANCE - Made of premium steel to survive the bumps of learning, the durable steel frame is backed by our limited lifetime warranty. The bike comes with black tire & single speed, only little maintenance needed due to the simple design. | DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal, they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain, it will last longer than other bikes, your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain. | EASY TO INSTALL - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools, only pump needed for tire, normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. Sections.Title: aplus content video
Texts: Gets Kids Outside Playing outdoors has been proven to have a variety of benefits for kids
Improve Coordination and Balance Bicycling not only engages the whole body, but also multiple different parts of the brain.
Promotes Kids’ Self-Confidence and Independence Learning to ride a bike is difficult. mastering that skill can boost kids’ self-confidence
Keeps Kids Physically Healthy Riding a bike is a great way to ensure that kids stay active and healthy.
The whole family can enjoy together Cycling with kids can help you be close to them, understand their problems and worries

Bikes are some of the most memorable and useful gifts you can give this holiday season. When you give a child a kids bike that fits them, you are beginning a life-long habit of healthy fun. They will learn independence, balance, and fitness.

customers_say: Customers find this bicycle to be a solid, well-made first bike that's easy to assemble and appears very good looking. They consider it a great purchase for the price and say it's perfect for children, particularly mentioning it's suitable for 4-year-olds and 6.5-year-old grandsons. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some say it's sturdy, others report it coming apart, and the training wheels have stability issues as they slide after a few rides. The weight is also mixed, with some finding it not very heavy while others say it's a bit heavy.

Product_Description: Sporty Design: RoyalBaby Freestyle Kid's BMX-style bike is all about fun, creativity, and freedom with a sporty look for the next cycling star, with a fully adjustable seat and handlebars to grow with your toddler Specifically for Kids: Equipped with RoyalBaby patented sealed bearing for smooth pedaling, never-bent training wheels, and a seat holder to help maintain balance while learning; Built-in water bottle holder adds more joy to every ride Safety: Coaster brakes with an improved brake level feature a shorter grip length, perfect to fit a kid's strength to ensure a safe stop, while the sturdy steel frame, non-slip pedals, chainguard, and pneumatic tires provide maximum stability for safe adventures

Features_Specs.Warranty Description: RoyalBaby provide lifetime warranty for bike frames and front forks, and free replacement for easy-wearing parts within 6 months. If you have issues such as missing parts, defects or damages, please feel free to contact RoyalBaby service. You can send an email to [service@royal-bike.com] and a specialist will come to help you out, or leave a message by WhatsApp to +1 (626) 628-4176, we will reply in 6 hours. You can also call 888-881-2453 on Mon – Fri, 9:00AM – 5:00PM CST.

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Features: Design for Kids: 18 inch bike for 5-8 years. This bike features a lightweight frame, forward-positioned cranks and pedals. The narrower pedal positions, smaller grips, and compact seat ensure a comfortable and controlled riding experience for early rider | Built To Last: Sturdy Hi-Ten steel frame and fork provide awesome impact resistance when riding over rocky and bumpy terrain, trailing edge tires provide good traction in wet and dry conditions, easily survive the multiple bumps of learning balance | Safety Riding: Coaster brake and Handbrake offer double safer, this kids bike will have more stopping power. And the wheels wrapped in Rubber off-road tires for outstanding grip and stability in any weather conditions. Comes with Full chain guard | Grow with Kids: Equipped with removable training wheels, height-adjustable saddle and handlebar, this kids bicycle can meet the needs of your child at different stages and grow with them. As your kids grow in confidence they can move to the next challenge | Easy to Assemble - The kids bike comes with 85% assembled and the basic assembly tools included and also limited lifetime warranty. Assembly was straight forward and normally it takes 30 minutes for a fresh hand to install the bike

Title: JOYSTAR Pluto 12 14 16 18 20 Inch Kids Bike with Light Up Training Wheels, Kids' Bicycle for Boys Girls Age 3-12 Years, Child
Features: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1.This kids bike comes with flash training wheel, basket and water bottle for early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4. Foot brake and handbrake easy to provide phenomenal stopping power when needed. | DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal, they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain, it will last longer than other bikes, your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain. | EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools, only pump needed for tire, normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. If you have problem about assembly or the bike, please contact us. | RECOMMENDED SIZE CHART - 12" BIKE FOR 3-4 YEARS (33"-41") TODDLER, 14" bike for 3-5 years (35" - 47") child, 16" bike for 4-7 years (41" - 53") boys & girls, 18" bike for 5-9 years (43"-59") boys & girls 20Inch bike for 7-12 years. Note: child height may vary even at the same age, please take the height into consideration. | ALWAYS RELIABLE - JOYSTAR bike complies with the CPSC standards, and Made of premium steel to survive the bumps of learning, the durable steel frame is backed by our limited lifetime warranty. Customers will be provided with 24 hours service when contacting JOYSTAR for any queries.

Product_Description: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1.This kids bike comes with flash training wheel, basket and water bottle for early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4. Foot brake and handbrake easy to provide phenomenal stopping power when needed. DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal, they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain, it will last longer than other bikes, your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain. EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools, only pump needed for tire, normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. If you have problem about assembly or the bike, please contact us.

customers_say: Customers find this children's bike to be a nice beginning model that's easy to assemble and particularly suitable for 4-year-olds and grandkids. The bike receives positive feedback for its appearance and functionality, though some report issues with the front brake not working at all. The sturdiness and durability receive mixed reviews - while some find it sturdy, others report issues with the front wheel being wobbly and the seat cracking quickly. Value for money opinions are divided, with some considering it a great product for the price while others find it expensive for the quality.

Title: Glerc 20 24 26 Inch Kids Bike, Kids Mountain Bike for Boys and Girls Ages 6+, 21-Speed Skyline Bicycle with Front Suspension
Features: 【Sturdy Frame】The kids mountain bike is made of high carbon steel frame, which can easily handle the challenges of off-road adventures, providing a reliable foundation for your child's adventures. | 【Ride Anytime】This mountain bike is equipped with a 21-speed drivetrain, offering versatile speed options to tackle diverse terrains, while its smooth and efficient gear shifting further elevates the riding experience. | 【Easy Distance Control】This kids bicycle features responsive disc brakes that provide more precise braking control and maintain excellent performance in adverse conditions, allowing your child to ride with confidence. | 【Safer Adventure】The suspension fork of the kids bike absorbs shock and vibration from rough terrain, greatly improving comfort and maneuverability during riding. | 【Size Information】This 20 inch bike is suitable for children ages 6-12, 45"-55" tall, with an inseam height of 21"-25". The bike weighs 30 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size.

Product_Description: Variable SpeedsGlerc's kids' mountain bike boasts a 21-speed system, offering plenty of gear options. The 21-speed transmission reduces pedaling effort on inclines. Robust & SafeA high-carbon steel frame ensures durability, while aluminum disc brakes provide easy, secure stopping. The bike features sturdy, lightweight aluminum alloy rims and puncture-resistant tires. Aesthetic Brake CableThe brake cable is partially concealed for a clean look, minimizing wear. Non-slip pedals with a kickstand are included. Suspension DesignThe reinforced front suspension fork absorbs impacts and ensures control. Easy SetupThe bike arrives 85% assembled. The remaining assembly can be completed by the customer, with the package including the frame, pedals, bell, tool kit, reflectors, and a user manual.

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Product_Description: The RoyalBaby 20"24" 26" kids mountain bike combines performance and safety with its ultra-light aluminum frame that's lighter than steel yet durable enough for bumps and jumps. Featuring a smooth-shifting 21-speed Shimano-style drivetrain, young riders can easily tackle hills and flat roads while developing cycling skills. The shock-absorbing suspension fork minimizes bumps for comfortable rides on rough terrain, gravel paths, or sidewalks, while all-terrain knobby tires provide excellent traction on various surfaces. Safety comes first with reliable front and rear hand brakes featuring easy-to-squeeze levers for confident stopping power. The adjustable seat and handlebars grow with your child, while non-slip pedals and ergonomic grips ensure comfort on longer rides. Finished in a vibrant green with a sleek, modern design, this bike is as stylish as it is functional - perfect for young adventurers ages 10-14 to explore their surroundings with confidence and ease.

You can also call 888-881-2453 on Mon – Fri, 9:00AM – 5:00PM CST.

customers_say: Customers find the bike to be a quality piece of equipment that's easy to assemble and appreciate its cool appearance and color. Moreover, the bike is sturdy and offers good value for money, making it suitable for beginners, with one customer noting it's perfect for a 4-5 year old. However, customers report durability issues, with one mentioning the front tire snap assembly coming unhinged, and alignment problems, with another noting serious frame misalignment.

Expert_Review_Inputs.title: Glerc 20 24 26 Inch Kids Bike, Kids Mountain Bike for Boys and Girls Ages 6+, 21-Speed Skyline Bicycle with Front Suspension

evidenceHighlights.text: 【Sturdy Frame】The kids mountain bike is made of high carbon steel frame, which can easily handle the challenges of off-road adventures, providing a reliable foundation for your child's adventures.

【Ride Anytime】This mountain bike is equipped with a 21-speed drivetrain, offering versatile speed options to tackle diverse terrains, while its smooth and efficient gear shifting further elevates the riding experience.

【Easy Distance Control】This kids bicycle features responsive disc brakes that provide more precise braking control and maintain excellent performance in adverse conditions, allowing your child to ride with confidence.
【Safer Adventure】The suspension fork of the kids bike absorbs shock and vibration from rough terrain, greatly improving comfort and maneuverability during riding.

【Size Information】This 20 inch bike is suitable for children ages 6-12, 45"-55" tall, with an inseam height of 21"-25". The bike weighs 30 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size.

Variable SpeedsGlerc's kids' mountain bike boasts a 21-speed system, offering plenty of gear options. The 21-speed transmission reduces pedaling effort on inclines. Robust & SafeA high-carbon steel frame ensures durability, while aluminum disc brakes provide easy, secure stopping. The bike features sturdy, lightweight aluminum alloy rims and puncture-resistant tires. Aesthetic Brake CableThe brake cable is partially concealed for a clean look, minimizing wear. Non-slip pedals with a kickstand are included. Suspension DesignThe reinforced front suspension fork absorbs impacts and ensures control. Easy SetupThe bike arrives 85% assembled. The remaining assembly can be completed by the customer, with the package including the frame, pedals, bell, tool kit, reflectors, and a user manual.
kids mountain bike
Wheel Size: 20 Inches

Sections.Title: Give your child the gift of a memorable childhood experience with the CUBSALA Kids Bike.
Texts: Introduce your child to the joy of riding with the Cubsala Kids Bike. Specially designed for early riders, this bike features training wheels that provide stable support while your child learns to balance and pedal. The adjustable seat height ensures a perfect fit as your child grows, allowing for comfortable and confident rides.
Suggest Rider Height Range:
Suitable Age Range:
12'' Bike: 2 - 4 years old 14'' bike: 3 - 5 years old 16'' bike: 4 - 7 years old 18'' bike: 5 - 10 years old
Sturdy High Tensile Steel Frame and Front Fork
Coaster Brake
Adjustable Saddle
Removable Training Wheels
Durable 2.4 inch Wide Tires
Easy to Assemble
Necessary Tool Kit Included
Equipped with 2.4 inch wide tires, the bicycle has stronger grip and can easily handle sandy and muddy roads in urban environments.
CUBSALA's starry series are equipped with reliable and more suitable coaster brakes for children. Just pedal backwards to bring enough braking force.
Removable and sturdy training wheels can help your child better balance when starting to learn cycling.

Sections.Title: aplus content video
Texts: Gets Kids Outside Playing outdoors has been proven to have a variety of benefits for kids
Improve Coordination and Balance Bicycling not only engages the whole body, but also multiple different parts of the brain.
Promotes Kids’ Self-Confidence and Independence Learning to ride a bike is difficult. mastering that skill can boost kids’ self-confidence
Keeps Kids Physically Healthy Riding a bike is a great way to ensure that kids stay active and healthy.
The whole family can enjoy together Cycling with kids can help you be close to them, understand their problems and worries

Bikes are some of the most memorable and useful gifts you can give this holiday season. When you give a child a kids bike that fits them, you are beginning a life-long habit of healthy fun. They will learn independence, balance, and fitness.

Title: WEIZE Kids Bikes,Boy's Bike for Kids,BMX Style Bicycle for Boys Girls Ages 4-12 Years Old,Kids Bicycle with Adjustable Seat,T
Features: Safe Riding Guarantee:The kid bike is designed with a dual system of handbrake and foot brake for children, and even young or weak children can use the foot brake to brake smoothly. Fully enclosed chain guard, effectively preventing pants legs and skirts from being caught up, making cycling more reassuring. | Durable And Easy To Maintain:The bicycle for boys girls adopts a high carbon steel frame, which is sturdy, resistant to bumps, and long-lasting. The front and rear fenders are fully protected, preventing mud and water from splashing and dirtying clothes, making daily maintenance worry free and effortless. | Accompanying Children's Growth:The 16 inch kid bicycle comes standard with detachable auxiliary wheels, which are more stable during the beginner stage and can be removed after proficiency. Adjustable seats without tools and manually adjustable height, easily adapting to the cycling needs of children of different ages. | Scientific Age Matching:We offer boy bikes in two sizes: 16 inches and 20 inches. 16 inches are suitable for 4-6 years old (height 43-49 inches), 20 inches are suitable for 6-12 years old (height 46-56 inches), and there are three color options for bicycles to meet individual preferences. | Quick Installation Experience:This children's bike is 85% pre installed and comes with clear instructions and online assembly video guidance. It can be easily installed in about 20 minutes, saving time and effort.

evidenceHighlights.text: Safe Riding Guarantee:The kid bike is designed with a dual system of handbrake and foot brake for children, and even young or weak children can use the foot brake to brake smoothly. Fully enclosed chain guard, effectively preventing pants legs and skirts from being caught up, making cycling more reassuring.

Durable And Easy To Maintain:The bicycle for boys girls adopts a high carbon steel frame, which is sturdy, resistant to bumps, and long-lasting. The front and rear fenders are fully protected, preventing mud and water from splashing and dirtying clothes, making daily maintenance worry free and effortless.

Accompanying Children's Growth:The 16 inch kid bicycle comes standard with detachable auxiliary wheels, which are more stable during the beginner stage and can be removed after proficiency. Adjustable seats without tools and manually adjustable height, easily adapting to the cycling needs of children of different ages.

Scientific Age Matching:We offer boy bikes in two sizes: 16 inches and 20 inches. 16 inches are suitable for 4-6 years old (height 43-49 inches), 20 inches are suitable for 6-12 years old (height 46-56 inches), and there are three color options for bicycles to meet individual preferences.

Quick Installation Experience:This children's bike is 85% pre installed and comes with clear instructions and online assembly video guidance. It can be easily installed in about 20 minutes, saving time and effort.

Title: JOYSTAR Fantasy Girls Bike for 2-12 Years Old Toddlers and Kids, 12" 14" 16" 18“ 20" Retro Style Kids Bike with Training Whee
Features: 1, Retro Design and Colors! JOYSTAR Fantasy Princess 20 Inch Girls bike with bright colors, stylish and charming. DIY decals and beautiful basket add extra fun to the ride. Soft seat offers more comfort in riding. | 2, Easier to Ride! Your little ones will enjoy a smoother ride with JOYSTAR sealed bearing, Brake lever allows little riders brake efficiently. Kickstand is included. Single speed drivetrain is simple and reliable. | 3, Safer Riding! The Front hand caliper Brake plus rear coaster/foot brake offer ample stopping power with more safety, wide 2.125" pneumatic tires add more stability, Sturdy steel frame and crank, Non-slip resin pedal, enclosed chainguard, front & rear reflectors and wheel reflectors make this bike safe to ride. | 4, Easy Assembly! 85% of this kids bike is assembled. The front tire, the seat and training wheels need to be installed. Assembly tools and an easy to follow instructions are included. Adult assembly is required. | 5, Choose the Right Size! 20 inch kids bicycle is fit for 7-12 years (height 47" - 62") The handlebars and seat height are all adjustable. Grow up with your children. The steel frame and fork are guaranteed by our LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY.

Sections.Title: Best Gifts for Kids
Texts: Riding a bike is one of the best parts of growing up, and JOYSTAR offers a full lineup of kids' bikes to start making memories. From the first wobbly strides on the balance bike to the first time hitting real singletrack, our all-new kid's bikes are designed to create amazing  rides. Our Mission is to get more kids outside riding bikes and make children happy. Let’s Ride Together!

Best Home and Garden Brands JOYSTAR has been be chosen as America's Best Home and Garden Brands 2022 . We continue to make children happy with JOYSTAR kids bike.

How did we get our start? We love cycling. When we had our kids, we couldn't wait to share our love of cycling with them. JOYSTAR kids bikes are a great start to a lifelong love of riding. What problem are we solving? We set out to create a kid’s bike that have adjustable saddle & stem height for a better fit and low gearing for easy pedaling, it makes riding easier and safer. What is our goal? JOYSTAR kids bikes are designed for maximum enjoyment. Our childlike design will make your child's ride enjoyable and bring fun to their life. Happy Riding!

Product_Description: JOYSTAR Angel Kids Bike is one of the best looking children's bikes on the market. A lightweight steel frame with a low stand-over height will make your young girl's first bike experience comfortable and confidence inspiring. Colorful paint will catch the attention of the little lady in your life at first glance. From the bike basket to the decals on the seat, there are a ton of details that make this kid's bike stand out from the pack. This girls bike also features a basket, a quick release seat post, and training wheels. The adjustable seat is a significant upgrade feature that helps you adjust the seat height as your child grows older. Putting together this bike is as easy as it is to ride! Upon your purchase, the bike is 85% complete and only requires you to install parts such as the front wheel, the saddle, pedals, handlebar, and wheels. With all tools included in the package, fixing the pieces will be done within a considerable amount of time.

customers_say: Customers find this bicycle to be an awesome first bike that's easy to assemble, cute, and sturdy with great stability. Moreover, it's particularly suitable for toddlers, with one customer noting it grows with the child for years of fun. However, the braking system receives mixed reviews - while the hand brake works, the front brake doesn't function properly. Additionally, durability is a concern as customers report issues with tire damage and broken components. Value for money opinions are mixed, with some finding it good for the price while others consider it a waste of money.

Title: JOYSTAR Fantasy Girls Bike for 2-12 Years Old Toddlers and Kids, 12" 14" 16" 18“ 20" Retro Style Kids Bike with Training Whee
Features: 1, Retro Design and Colors! JOYSTAR Fantasy Princess Girls bike with bright colors, stylish and charming. DIY decals and beautiful basket add extra fun to the ride. Soft seat offers more comfort in riding. | 2, Easier to Ride! Your little ones will enjoy a smoother ride with JOYSTAR sealed bearing, Brake lever allows little riders brake efficiently. Removable training wheels & kickstand are included. Single speed drivetrain is simple and reliable. | 3, Safer Riding! The Front hand caliper Brake plus rear coaster/foot brake offer ample stopping power with more safety, wide 2.125" pneumatic tires add more stability, Sturdy steel frame and crank, Non-slip resin pedal, enclosed chainguard, front & rear reflectors and wheel reflectors make this bike safe to ride. | 4, Easy Assembly! 85% of this kids bike is assembled. The front tire, the seat and training wheels need to be installed. Assembly tools and an easy to follow instructions are included. Adult assembly is required. | 5, Choose the Right Size! 18 inch kids bicycle is fit for 5-9 years (height 43" - 59") The handlebars and seat height are all adjustable. Grow up with your children. The steel frame and fork are guaranteed by our LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY.

Texts: Riding a bike is one of the best parts of growing up, and JOYSTAR offers a full lineup of kids' bikes to start making memories. From the first wobbly strides on the balance bike to the first time hitting real singletrack, our all-new kid's bikes are designed to create amazing  rides. Our Mission is to get more kids outside riding bikes and make children happy. Let’s Ride Together!

Best Home and Garden Brands JOYSTAR has been be chosen as America's Best Home and Garden Brands 2022 . We continue to make children happy with JOYSTAR kids bike.

How did we get our start? We love cycling. When we had our kids, we couldn't wait to share our love of cycling with them. JOYSTAR kids bikes are a great start to a lifelong love of riding. What problem are we solving? We set out to create a kid’s bike that have adjustable saddle & stem height for a better fit and low gearing for easy pedaling, it makes riding easier and safer. What is our goal? JOYSTAR kids bikes are designed for maximum enjoyment. Our childlike design will make your child's ride enjoyable and bring fun to their life. Happy Riding!

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Product_Description: The RoyalBaby 20"24" 26" kids mountain bike combines performance and safety with its ultra-light aluminum frame that's lighter than steel yet durable enough for bumps and jumps. Featuring a smooth-shifting 21-speed Shimano-style drivetrain, young riders can easily tackle hills and flat roads while developing cycling skills. The shock-absorbing suspension fork minimizes bumps for comfortable rides on rough terrain, gravel paths, or sidewalks, while all-terrain knobby tires provide excellent traction on various surfaces. Safety comes first with reliable front and rear hand brakes featuring easy-to-squeeze levers for confident stopping power. The adjustable seat and handlebars grow with your child, while non-slip pedals and ergonomic grips ensure comfort on longer rides. Finished in a vibrant green with a sleek, modern design, this bike is as stylish as it is functional - perfect for young adventurers ages 10-14 to explore their surroundings with confidence and ease.

evidenceHighlights.text: 【Sturdy Frame】The kids mountain bike is made of high carbon steel frame, which can easily handle the challenges of off-road adventures, providing a reliable foundation for your child's adventures.

【Ride Anytime】This mountain bike is equipped with a 21-speed drivetrain, offering versatile speed options to tackle diverse terrains, while its smooth and efficient gear shifting further elevates the riding experience.

【Easy Distance Control】This kids bicycle features responsive disc brakes that provide more precise braking control and maintain excellent performance in adverse conditions, allowing your child to ride with confidence.
【Safer Adventure】The suspension fork of the kids bike absorbs shock and vibration from rough terrain, greatly improving comfort and maneuverability during riding.

【Size Information】This 24 inch bike is suitable for children ages 9-15, 53"-66" tall, with an inseam height of 24"-29". The bike weighs 34 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size.

Variable SpeedsGlerc's kids' mountain bike boasts a 21-speed system, offering plenty of gear options. The 21-speed transmission reduces pedaling effort on inclines. Robust & SafeA high-carbon steel frame ensures durability, while aluminum disc brakes provide easy, secure stopping. The bike features sturdy, lightweight aluminum alloy rims and puncture-resistant tires. Aesthetic Brake CableThe brake cable is partially concealed for a clean look, minimizing wear. Non-slip pedals with a kickstand are included. Suspension DesignThe reinforced front suspension fork absorbs impacts and ensures control. Easy SetupThe bike arrives 85% assembled. The remaining assembly can be completed by the customer, with the package including the frame, pedals, bell, tool kit, reflectors, and a user manual.

features: SPORTY DESIGN. RoyalBaby Freestyle kid's bike was designed by inspiration from the BMX spirit
and friends. The sporty-looking is perfect for the next cycling star!
SPECIFICALLY FOR KIDS. Each bike equipped with RoyalBaby patent sealed bearing for smooth pedaling. Training wheels come with 12

making it easy to maintain balance and learn to pedal even for young beginners. The water bottle and holder adds more joy to the ride. Fully adjustable seat and handlebar will give extra space when kids grow taller
SAFETY. Shortest travel distance grips provides extra braking efficiency
sturdy steel frame and 2.4" wide cylinder tires will accompany every adventure of your little one and bring them home safe and sound
EASY ASSEMBLY. The bike comes 95% pre-assembled
with an elaborated instruction manual and all tools needed in the box. It is easy enough to put together in 15 minutes
ALWAYS RELIABLE. RoyalBaby bike complies with the CPSC standards
and is trusted by millions of families in more than 80 countries globally. Customers will be provided with high-level warranty and local 24 hours service when contacting RoyalBaby for any queries
Pedal power (human energy transferred through a drivetrain)
Lifetime warranty for frame and fork. ‎Free replacement for easy-wearing parts within 6 months

evidenceHighlights.text: Efficient Braking System:This kid mountain bicycle is equipped with front and rear caliper brakes, providing high responsiveness and reliable braking power. Whether on wet surfaces or steep downhill paths, the braking system ensures quick deceleration and control, safeguarding young riders during their adventures

Excellent Configuration,Stable Riding:This kids bike adopts a high carbon steel frame, which has excellent impact resistance and long-lasting durability. The front suspension fork absorbs the impact of bumpy terrain, reduces vibration, and improves stability

Adjustable and Ergonomic Design:The bike for kids features a height-adjustable saddle (20-inch: 63–71 cm; 24-inch: 69–84 cm) and an ergonomic seat designed for comfort during extended rides. It is easy to adapt to growing children and ensure that kid bicycles maintain a perfect fit at multiple stages of development

Designed for Girls:20 inch girls bike is suitable for 6-11 years (42-56 Inch) kids.24 inch girls bike is suitable for 8-14 years (54-66 Inch) kids. Each kids bike is designed specifically for a particular age group, providing a tailored riding experience

Quick Installation Experience:This children's bike is 85% pre installed and comes with clear instructions and online assembly video guidance. It can be easily installed in about 20 minutes, saving time and effort

Available in 20 or 24-inch sizes, this WEIZE girls' mountain bike features a durable high-carbon steel frame, 6-speed shifting, and responsive dual caliper brakes for safety, combined with a front suspension fork and adjustable ergonomic seat to ensure a smooth, growing fit for any young adventurer.

Title: vollsch BMX Style 12 14 16 Inch Kids Bike Training Wheels 20'' Bicycle with Kickstand for 2-14 Years Old Toddlers Boys Girls
Features: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development | Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs | Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding | Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process | Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

Sections.Title: aplus content video
Texts: Gets Kids Outside Playing outdoors has been proven to have a variety of benefits for kids
Improve Coordination and Balance Bicycling not only engages the whole body, but also multiple different parts of the brain.
Promotes Kids’ Self-Confidence and Independence Learning to ride a bike is difficult. mastering that skill can boost kids’ self-confidence
Keeps Kids Physically Healthy Riding a bike is a great way to ensure that kids stay active and healthy.
The whole family can enjoy together Cycling with kids can help you be close to them, understand their problems and worries

Bikes are some of the most memorable and useful gifts you can give this holiday season. When you give a child a kids bike that fits them, you are beginning a life-long habit of healthy fun. They will learn independence, balance, and fitness.

customers_say: Customers find this bicycle to be a perfect first bike that's easy to assemble and appreciate its nice appearance. The bike is sturdy, with one customer noting the training wheels provide good stability for beginners, and they consider it good value for money. They like its size, with one mentioning the wide tires, and find it suitable for 2-4 year olds. While some customers find it durable, others report issues with the chain falling off.

evidenceHighlights.text: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development

Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs

Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding

Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process

Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

Watch your little ones' confidence soar as they ride VOLLSCH kids bicycles.

Sections.Title: aplus content video
Texts: Gets Kids Outside Playing outdoors has been proven to have a variety of benefits for kids
Improve Coordination and Balance Bicycling not only engages the whole body, but also multiple different parts of the brain.
Promotes Kids’ Self-Confidence and Independence Learning to ride a bike is difficult. mastering that skill can boost kids’ self-confidence
Keeps Kids Physically Healthy Riding a bike is a great way to ensure that kids stay active and healthy.
The whole family can enjoy together Cycling with kids can help you be close to them, understand their problems and worries

Bikes are some of the most memorable and useful gifts you can give this holiday season. When you give a child a kids bike that fits them, you are beginning a life-long habit of healthy fun. They will learn independence, balance, and fitness.

customers_say: Customers find this bicycle to be a solid, well-made first bike that's easy to assemble and appears very good looking. They consider it a great purchase for the price and say it's perfect for children, particularly mentioning it's suitable for 4-year-olds and 6.5-year-old grandsons. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some say it's sturdy, others report it coming apart, and the training wheels have stability issues as they slide after a few rides. The weight is also mixed, with some finding it not very heavy while others say it's a bit heavy.

The bike receives positive feedback for its appearance and value for money. However, customers disagree on the bike's sturdiness, with some finding it sturdy while others describe it as flimsy. Moreover, durability is a concern as multiple customers report it breaking after one use, and stability is an issue with the training wheels not staying in place.

Title: vollsch BMX Style 12 14 16 Inch Kids Bike Training Wheels 20'' Bicycle with Kickstand for 2-14 Years Old Toddlers Boys Girls
Features: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development | Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs | Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding | Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process | Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

evidenceHighlights.text: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development

Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs

Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding

Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process

Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

The remaining assembly can be completed by the customer, with the package including the frame, pedals, bell, tool kit, reflectors, and a user manual.

Product_Description: The RoyalBaby 20"24" 26" kids mountain bike combines performance and safety with its ultra-light aluminum frame that's lighter than steel yet durable enough for bumps and jumps. Featuring a smooth-shifting 21-speed Shimano-style drivetrain, young riders can easily tackle hills and flat roads while developing cycling skills. The shock-absorbing suspension fork minimizes bumps for comfortable rides on rough terrain, gravel paths, or sidewalks, while all-terrain knobby tires provide excellent traction on various surfaces. Safety comes first with reliable front and rear hand brakes featuring easy-to-squeeze levers for confident stopping power. The adjustable seat and handlebars grow with your child, while non-slip pedals and ergonomic grips ensure comfort on longer rides. Finished in a vibrant green with a sleek, modern design, this bike is as stylish as it is functional - perfect for young adventurers ages 10-14 to explore their surroundings with confidence and ease.

If you have issues such as missing parts, defects or damages, please feel free to contact RoyalBaby service. You can send an email to [service@royal-bike.com] and a specialist will come to help you out, or leave a message by WhatsApp to +1 (626) 628-4176, we will reply in 6 hours. You can also call 888-881-2453 on Mon – Fri, 9:00AM – 5:00PM CST.
